ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
[unknown] Zhong (?種). Brother-in-law of Ma Chao, fled to Hanzhong when Ma Chao attacked Wei. [unknown] Zhong was affiliated with Ma Chao.
